profile.field.name: Name

memory.window.subtitle: Manage summaries, search parameters, and saved memories in one place.
memory.metric.total.label: Total memories
memory.metric.important.label: Important memories
memory.metric.embedding.label: Embedding coverage
memory.metric.threshold.label: Auto summary threshold
memory.list.title: Memory list
memory.empty.title: No memory selected
memory.empty.body: Select a memory on the left to view details and actions here.
memory.inspector.title: Selected memory
memory.tuning.title: Memory retrieval settings
memory.tuning.body: Adjust the auto-summary threshold and retrieval parameters here.
memory.tuning.threshold.title: Auto-summary after N messages
memory.tuning.threshold.body: Run auto-summary when a conversation chunk exceeds this value.
memory.tuning.important.title: Max important memories
memory.tuning.important.body: Always review up to this many important memories first.
memory.tuning.similar.title: Max similar memories
memory.tuning.similar.body: Choose how many meaningfully similar memories to retrieve.
memory.tuning.recent.title: Max recent memories
memory.tuning.recent.body: Include this many recent memories regardless of similarity.
memory.tuning.similarity.title: Minimum similarity
memory.tuning.similarity.body: Exclude memories below this similarity threshold.
memory.tuning.note: Values in this tab are saved immediately.
memory.delete.title: Delete confirmation
memory.profile.missing.title: No profile
memory.profile.empty.title: No profile data
memory.profile.empty.body:
No profile information is saved yet.
Chat to extract information automatically.
chat.actions.summary.title: Conversation summary
chat.actions.note.title: Open or close the Obsidian note panel
chat.actions.mood.title: Mood status
chat.actions.promises.title: Scheduled conversation promises
chat.promise.panel.title: Scheduled
chat.mood.label: Mood: {label}
chat.summary.confirm.title: Manual summary
chat.summary.confirm.body: Would you like to start a manual summary?
settings.window.title: ENE Settings
settings.theme.mode.light.title: Light Theme
settings.theme.mode.light.description: Balanced bright neutral palette for both settings and chat surfaces.
settings.theme.mode.dark.title: Dark Theme
settings.theme.mode.dark.description: Calm high-contrast dark palette for both settings and chat surfaces.
settings.theme.variant.light_classic.des: Balanced bright neutral palette for everyday use.
settings.theme.variant.light_sand.title: Warm Sand
settings.theme.variant.light_sand.descri: Warm off-white surfaces with sand accents for a softer look.
settings.theme.variant.light_mint.title: Mint Studio
settings.theme.variant.light_mint.descri: Crisp mint accents for a fresher, more vivid tone.
settings.theme.variant.dark_midnight.des: Default dark palette closest to ENE's current mood.
settings.theme.variant.dark_graphite.des: More neutral dark palette with less blue tint.
settings.theme.variant.dark_forest.title: Deep Forest
settings.theme.variant.dark_forest.descr: Calm dark palette with deep forest-green accents.
settings.llm.provider.gemini.label: Google Gemini API
settings.llm.provider.openai.label: OpenAI Responses API
settings.llm.provider.anthropic.label: Anthropic Claude API
settings.llm.provider.openrouter.label: OpenRouter Gateway
settings.llm.provider.deepseek.label: DeepSeek API
settings.llm.provider.ollama.label: Ollama Local
settings.llm.provider.custom_api.label: Custom API Endpoint
settings.tts.provider.gpt_sovits_http.hi: Local or remote GPT-SoVITS server that uses reference audio and prompt text.
settings.tts.provider.genie_tts_http.hin: Genie-TTS server that preloads a fixed character, registers reference audio, and then synthesizes speech.
settings.tts.provider.openai_compatible_: Compatible speech endpoint that follows the OpenAI audio speech schema.
settings.tts.provider.elevenlabs.label: ElevenLabs TTS
settings.tts.provider.elevenlabs.hint: ElevenLabs text-to-speech endpoint with voice controls.
settings.tts.provider.browser_speech.hin: Fallback speechSynthesis voices exposed through the embedded browser.

content.placeholder: Choose a section to adjust its details.

sidebar.title: ENE Settings
sidebar.meta: Choose a section on the left and adjust the details on the right.

footer.title: Apply Settings
footer.body: Changes stay in preview until you save. Cancel returns to the previous state, and some LLM changes apply most reliably after a restart.

ui_language.label: UI language:
ui_language.hint: Preview this dialog in a different language now. After saving, the same language becomes the default for future runs.

quick.title: Quick placement
quick.hint: Pick a common position first, then fine-tune the coordinates and size below.

overview.title: Theme overview
overview.hint: The settings window and chat window move together in the same theme mode. Pick light or dark above, then fine-tune colors below if needed.

theme.follow_system: Follow the current Windows app theme (light/dark)

settings_window_bg_color.title: Outer window background
settings_window_bg_color.description: Base backdrop behind the entire settings surface.

settings_card_bg_color.title: Settings card background
settings_card_bg_color.description: Surface color for the title bar, cards, and tab areas.

settings_input_bg_color.title: Input field background
settings_input_bg_color.description: Base background for inputs, dropdowns, and lists.

chat_panel_bg_color.title: Chat panel background
chat_panel_bg_color.description: Base background for the lower chat panel and helper widgets.

chat_input_bg_color.title: Chat input background
chat_input_bg_color.description: Base background for the input field and input wrapper.

chat_assistant_bubble_color.title: Assistant bubble background
chat_assistant_bubble_color.description: Base background for AI response bubbles.

chat_user_bubble_color.title: User bubble background
chat_user_bubble_color.description: Base background for user message bubbles.

theme_accent_color.title: Accent color
theme_accent_color.description: Used for save buttons, focus rings, selection states, and highlights.

status.invalid_hex: All theme colors must use a 6-digit HEX code in `#RRGGBB` format.
status.shared_mode: The settings and chat surfaces are configured to move together in the same theme mode.
status.follow_system_detail: Following the current Windows app theme ({mode}).

invalid_hex.title: Theme color check
invalid_hex.body: Every theme color must use a 6-digit HEX code in `#RRGGBB` format.

quick.title: Quick placement
quick.hint: Pick a common position first, then fine-tune it with the sliders below.

scale.title: Model size
scale.label: Scale:
scale.hint: Resize the entire model relative to the 1.00x baseline.

position_x.title: Model X position
position_x.hint: Move the model between the left and right edges of the screen.

position_y.title: Model Y position
position_y.hint: Move the model between the top and bottom edges of the screen.

path.title: Live2D model file
path.hint: Point directly to a `.model3.json` file. The preview also reloads the model before saving.

api_key.label: API key:
api_key.placeholder: API key for the selected provider
api_key.hint: Sensitive values stay hidden by default and are saved for the currently selected provider.

model_group.title: Model and response style
model_group.hint: Temperature and Top P adjust creativity, while Max Tokens limits response length.

custom_api_group.title: Custom API
custom_api_group.hint: This section is only used when the Custom API provider is selected.

embedding_group.title: Embedding settings
embedding_group.hint: Voyage AI is the only supported provider right now. After saving, the same model is used for new memories and similar-memory retrieval.

restart_group.title: Apply note
restart_group.body: Provider, key, and model changes may not appear immediately in every session. Restarting the app after saving is the most reliable way to apply them.

reference.title: Reference voice
reference.hint: This uses reference-voice synthesis, so you can point directly at a local or remote GPT-SoVITS endpoint.

character.title: Character
character.hint: Store the character name, ONNX model folder, and model language together so the Genie server can preload the character.

reference.title: Reference voice
reference.hint: Genie registers the reference voice on the server first, so it needs the audio path, transcript, and reference language together.

synthesis.title: Synthesis
synthesis.hint: Enable this if you want the server to break long text into sentence-sized chunks first.

voice.title: Model and voice
voice.hint: API URL, model, voice, and speed are separated, similar to AIRI's OpenAI Speech setup. The response format stays fixed to WAV for lip-sync analysis.

api_key.label: API key:
api_key.placeholder: Only if your endpoint requires one

voice.title: Model and voice
voice.hint: General-purpose settings for local TTS servers or proxy APIs that mimic the OpenAI speech schema.

voice.title: Model and voice style
voice.hint: These settings mirror the core ElevenLabs controls used in AIRI: model, Voice ID, stability, similarity boost, style, and speaker boost.

browser.title: Browser fallback TTS

status.idle: Read voices from the current ENE webview environment while this dialog is open. On another PC, the list refreshes for that environment again.
status.loading: Loading browser voices from the current environment...
status.no_webview: Could not find the current webview, so the voice list is unavailable.
status.waiting: No voices arrived yet. ENE will retry after the system voices finish initializing.
status.loaded: Loaded {total} available voices for this environment.
status.loaded_filtered: Loaded {total} available voices for this environment, and showing {visible} for {language}.

browser.hint: Useful as a fallback or quick test provider. It speaks without an API key, but voice quality and availability depend on the browser and OS in the deployment environment. If a saved voice is missing, ENE falls back naturally to a voice in the same language or the system default. Lip-sync is not applied.

display.title: Display elements
display.hint: Manage core surface visibility and mouse interaction together.

actions.title: Conversation and helper buttons
actions.hint: Turning on only the buttons you use often keeps the screen simpler.

ptt.title: Voice input (global PTT)
ptt.interrupt_tts: Interrupt ENE speech when PTT starts

hotkey.label: PTT hotkey:
hotkey.hint: Recording only continues while the key is held.
hotkey.waiting_hint: Press the key you want to use. Press Esc to cancel.

idle.title: Idle motion
idle.enable: Enable idle motion (automatic movement while ENE is not speaking)

search_scope.title: Memory Search Range
search_scope.body: Adjust how many recent visible conversation turns are referenced alongside the latest user message during long-term memory search. The extra turns are injected only for the current request, so the stored history stays clean.

turns.label: Recent conversation turns included in search:
turns.hint: Example: with 2 turns, ENE reviews the previous 2 user/assistant pairs together with the current message when searching long-term memory.

empty.title: Memory
empty.body: The memory manager is not initialized, so the memory list panel cannot be shown here.

header.title: Prompt Settings
header.body: Safely manage BASE_SYSTEM_PROMPT, SUB_PROMPT, EMOTIONS, and the emotion guide without editing the full Python files directly.

sub.title: SUB_PROMPT Body
sub.note: Emotion rules and the emotion usage guide are managed separately in the editor below.

emotion_required.body: At least one emotion is required.

header.title: User Memory Profile
header.body: Structurally manage only the basic_info, likes, dislikes, and facts fields in user_profile.json without opening the full raw JSON.
